query:
SELECT
                files.original_file_name,
                files.size,
                files.hash,
                files.upload_date
            FROM files
            INNER JOIN paths ON files.id == paths.file_id
            WHERE ? >= paths.valid_since
                AND ? < COALESCE(paths.valid_until, '9999-12-31T23:59:59Z')
                AND paths.path == ?;
